addVisitorStart.title: Providing visitor information
addVisitorStart.identityRequirement: All visitors to prisons in England and Wales, other than accompanied children under the age of 16, are required to prove their identity before entry.
addVisitorStart.acceptableId: The visitor information you provide must match the acceptable forms of ID that the visitor will show when they visit someone in prison.
addVisitorStart.visitorList: Visitors must also be on the prisoner’s visitor list. It can take several weeks for new visitors to get added to the prisoner’s visitor list.
addVisitorStart.incorrectInfoRejected: Requests with incorrect visitor information will be rejected.

checkVisitorDetails.title: Check your request
checkVisitorDetails.description: Your answers need to match the information on the prisoner’s visitor list.
checkVisitorDetails.confirmInformation: By submitting this request you confirm that, to the best of your knowledge, the details you are providing are correct. Visitors must be on the prisoner’s visitor list.
checkVisitorDetails.acceptableId: Make sure the visitor information you provide matches the acceptable forms of ID that the visitor will use when they visit someone in prison.

visitorApproved.title: Visitor linked
visitorApproved.visitorLinked: {{visitorName}} has been linked to your account
visitorApproved.approvedMessage: {{visitorName}} will appear as a visitor when you book visits for {{prisonerName}}.

visitorRequested.title: Request submitted
visitorRequested.requestReview: We will review your request and reply within 5 working days
visitorRequested.approvedOrRejected: You will get an email to say if your request has been approved or rejected.
visitorRequested.statusOnVisitorsPage: You can also view the status of your requests on the visitors page.

visitorRequestFailAlreadyLinked.title: Visitor already linked
visitorRequestFailAlreadyLinked.visitorAlreadyLinked: You have previously linked {{visitorName}} to your account.
visitorRequestFailAlreadyLinked.noNeedToSubmit: You do not need to submit a new request for this visitor.

visitorRequestFailAlreadyRequested.title: Visitor already requested
visitorRequestFailAlreadyRequested.visitorAlreadyRequested: You have previously submitted a request for {{visitorName}}.
visitorRequestFailAlreadyRequested.waitingToBeReviewed: It is waiting to be reviewed by the prison.

visitorRequestFailTooManyRequests.title: Visitor request cannot be submitted
visitorRequestFailTooManyRequests.limitReached: You have reached the limit for visitor requests.
visitorRequestFailTooManyRequests.cannotMakeAnotherRequest: You cannot make another request until one of your requests is reviewed. You will get an email to say if your request has been approved or rejected.
visitorRequestFailTooManyRequests.viewLinkedAndRequestedVisitors: You can view your linked and requested visitors.
